title: Harry and Meghan accept offer to stay at royal estate during UK visit
description: The royal residence the pair will use has not been made public, but they will also be staying in private accommodation during the trip.
content:
The Duke and Duchess of Sussex have accepted an offer to stay in a royal residence with their two children when they visit the UK next month.

title: Weekend to bring cooldown after record-breaking heatwave
description:
The record-breaking heatwave is set to end with cooler and more unsettled weather by
Sunday.
content:
Cooler air is set to move across the whole of the UK this weekend to end a spell of record-breaking heat.
But it will take its time to reach eastern and south-eastern England where it will remain searingly hot throughout Saturday.

title: How messages between two dads helped expose the largest NHS maternity scandal
description: Among the hundreds of affected families in Nottingham, two sets of parents led the fight to get answers.
content:

title: World Cup 2026: Thomas Tuchel defends full-back selection after Reece James injury
description: Thomas Tuchel defends his full-back selections after confirming Reece James will miss the match against Panama through injury.
content:
England manager Thomas Tuchel has defended his full-back selection policy after confirming Reece James will miss Saturday's World Cup match against Panama.

title: Home Office to introduce new asylum routes to UK
description: The home secretary said "capped safe and legal" routes would help to restore confidence in the asylum system.
content:
The Home Office is to introduce new "capped safe and legal" routes for asylum seekers to arrive in the UK later this year.
